news.title: 美伊战火延烧，全球震荡！
美司法部公布爱泼斯坦文件，含对特朗普未证实指控
news.title0: Withheld Epstein files with accusations against Trump released by justice department
news.content: 美国司法部公布了爱泼斯坦案相关文件，其中包含一名女性对前总统特朗普未经证实的性侵指控摘要。白宫称这些指控毫无根据。
news.content0: FBI documents summarising interviews with a woman who made unsubstantiated claims of sexual assault against Donald Trump have been released as part of the US Department of Justice's (DOJ) trove of Epstein files.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 安德鲁王子将保留伦敦金融城荣誉市民身份
news.title0: Mountbatten-Windsor to keep City of London Freedom
news.content: 伦敦金融城公司审查后确认，安德鲁·蒙巴顿-温莎因其父亲继承获得的“伦敦金融城荣誉市民”身份无法被剥夺。
news.content0: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor will keep one of his few remaining honours after a review determined it could not be removed.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 北爱尔兰水上乐园威胁排干湖水以阻止夜泳者
news.title0: Water park owner will drain lake unless trespassers stop swimming
news.content: 北爱尔兰一水上乐园所有者表示，若年轻人继续夜间非法进入湖中游泳，他将排干湖水，以防发生溺水悲剧。
news.content0: The owner of a water park has said he will drain the lake to prevent someone from potentially drowning unless young trespassers stop swimming in it at night.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美加贸易谈判在中断数月后恢复
news.title0: Canada and US resume trade talks after months-long pause
news.content: 加拿大贸易部长赴华盛顿与美方官员会晤，这是自去年底谈判破裂后两国首次高级别贸易会谈。
news.content0: Canada's minister for US-Canada trade, Dominic LeBlanc, is in Washington on Friday for meetings with Trump administration officials — the first high-level talks between the two countries since negotiations broke down late last year.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 梅根王妃生活方式品牌与Netflix结束合作
news.title0: Meghan's lifestyle brand and Netflix end partnership
news.content: 苏塞克斯公爵夫人梅根创立的“As ever”生活方式品牌宣布结束与流媒体巨头Netflix的合作伙伴关系，将独立运营。
news.content0: The Duchess of Sussex's lifestyle brand has ended its partnership with Netflix, it has been announced.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国2月非农就业意外减少9.2万个
news.title0: US economy unexpectedly sheds 92,000 jobs in February
news.content: 美国2月非农就业人数意外减少9.2万，失业率升至4.4%，引发对劳动力市场健康状况的担忧。
news.content0: The number of jobs in the US economy fell last month, an unexpected contraction that has renewed questions about whether the labour market in the US might be starting to crack.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 曼迪·摩尔夫妇在洛杉矶山火后重建家园
news.title0: Mandy Moore and Taylor Goldsmith nearly lost their dream home in the LA fires. Here’s how they rebuilt
news.content: 美国女星曼迪·摩尔与音乐家丈夫在洛杉矶山火中几乎失去梦想家园，目前正进行重建，并在《建筑文摘》分享历程。
news.content0: In 2020, Mandy Moore and her musician husband Taylor Goldsmith bought their dream home in Altadena, California, as a family of two, hiring a team to begin renovating the romantic Spanish Colonial Revival property and update its 1930s charm. In 2023, as a family of four, with another baby on the way, they moved in and began living their new life in Altadena’s enclave of historic architecture, mountain views and small-town charm.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 吉伦哈尔新片《新娘！》重新演绎弗兰肯斯坦的新娘
news.title0: Maggie Gyllenhaal and Jessie Buckley reimagine Frankenstein’s bride
news.content: 玛吉·吉伦哈尔执导、杰西·巴克利主演的新片《新娘！》本周上映，以女性视角重新演绎经典怪物故事《弗兰肯斯坦的新娘》。
news.content0: Since the invention of moving pictures, directors have been drawn to Mary Shelley’s 19th century gothic classic, “Frankenstein.” In 1931 James Whale offered his definitive take on the story with actor Boris Karloff’s flat-topped skull and grunting speech. The film was a commercial hit and solidified Universal Pictures’ reputation as the home of horror. The creature was then dug up and reanimated through the eyes of Terence Fisher in 1957, Mel Brooks in 1974 and Kenneth Branagh in 1994, to name a few. The last reboot — an emotionally sympathetic, albeit Disney-fied rendition in whichJacob Elordi’s long dark lashes take center stage— came from Mexican director Guillermo del Toro just a few months ago. But while the mood, genre and artistic direction of these adaptations may have shifted over the last century, one element has remained fairly consistent: almost all have been directed by men.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 龙卷风袭击美国密歇根州，造成严重破坏
news.title0: Damaging tornado hits Michigan as dangerous storms fire up across the Central US
news.content: 一场破坏性龙卷风袭击美国密歇根州西南部，摧毁建筑物并掀翻屋顶，恶劣天气正在美国中部多地蔓延。
news.content0: A damaging tornado roared through parts of southwestern Michigan Friday afternoon as severe thunderstorm activity ramps up across a broad section of the United States.
news.author: CNN
